subsections.title: **Cholamandalam Leasing Limited (formerly known as Cholamandalam Home Finance Limited)**
subsections.content: Cholamandalam Leasing Limited (formerly known as Cholamandalam Home Finance Limited) is a corporate agent with composite licence from Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India for distributing insurance products.

subsections.title: **Payswiff Technologies Private Limited (Payswiff)**
subsections.content: Payswiff is engaged in the business of enabling online payment gateway services for e-commerce businesses and provides e-commerce solutions. Payswiff is an omni channel payment transaction solution that lets business owners accept payments from their customers in-store, at home deliveries, online, and on-the-go using mPOS and POS solutions.

subsections.title: **Cholamandalam Securities Limited (CSEC)**
subsections.content: Chola Securities is a wealth management company offering investment solutions to individual clients and stock broking and equity advisory services to institutional investors, including many of the largest mutual funds in India. Chola Securities is a member of Bombay Stock Exchange Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited. Visit : Chola Securities

title: Our Happy Customers
